videos.title: Pediatric Cervical Spine Aneurysmal Bone Cyst: Surgical Resection and Stabilization
videos.description: Explore a complex pediatric neurosurgical case featuring the successful treatment of multiple aneurysmal bone cysts (ABC) in the cervical spine. Prof. Giv Sharifi details the surgical approach, which involved complete microsurgical tumor resection followed by subaxial posterior cervical fixation to ensure long-term spinal stability. This case study highlights the advanced techniques required to manage rare spinal tumors in pediatric patients, emphasizing the importance of precise surgical planning and stabilization for optimal recovery.

videos.title: Multidisciplinary Approach to Pituitary Macroadenoma Surgery: Insights from Prof. Guive Sharifi
videos.description: Join Prof. Guive Sharifi and his expert multidisciplinary team as they perform a complex, high-stakes endoscopic surgery for a Pituitary Macroadenoma. This educational video highlights the critical collaboration between neurosurgery, anesthesiology, and ENT specialists to ensure patient safety and optimal outcomes. Beyond the technical precision of the procedure, Prof. Sharifi offers a rare, personal look into the realities of modern neurosurgery, the challenges of the operating room, and his dedication to advancing surgical standards. This video is an essential resource for patients and medical professionals interested in the intricacies of skull base surgery and the power of team-based care.

videos.title: Expert Neurosurgical Insights with Prof. Giv Sharifi
videos.description: Join Prof. Giv Sharifi as he provides expert insights into advanced neurosurgical procedures. This educational video offers patients a clear understanding of complex brain and pituitary conditions, emphasizing the precision and dedication involved in modern neurosurgical care. Learn more about Prof. Sharifi’s commitment to patient health and surgical excellence.

videos.title: Chiari Malformation Decompression: Surgical Technique Overview
videos.description: This surgical walkthrough provides a detailed overview of the Chiari malformation decompression procedure performed by Prof. Giv Sharifi. The video demonstrates the technical steps involved, including suboccipital craniectomy, C1 laminectomy, and duraplasty, aimed at restoring normal cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) dynamics at the craniovertebral junction. This resource is intended for educational purposes to help patients and medical professionals understand the surgical approach to treating Chiari malformation.

videos.title: Vestibular Schwannoma Microsurgery: Facial Nerve Preservation Techniques
videos.description: This surgical case features Prof. Guive Sharifi and Dr. Ali Eftekharian performing a microsurgical resection of a vestibular schwannoma (acoustic neuroma) in a 69-year-old patient. The video highlights advanced microsurgical techniques, with a specific focus on the critical preservation of the facial nerve. By utilizing intraoperative nerve monitoring, the surgical team successfully maintained the functional integrity of the facial nerve, ensuring optimal patient outcomes. This demonstration serves as an educational resource for understanding the complexities of skull base surgery and the importance of nerve-sparing techniques in tumor removal.

videos.title: Advanced Endoscopic Surgery for Pituitary Adenomas: A Surgical Overview
videos.description: Prof. Giv Sharifi showcases a high-volume surgical day, successfully performing six endoscopic endonasal transsphenoidal surgeries for pituitary adenomas. This minimally invasive approach is highlighted for its precision in treating complex cases, including vision-impairing optic chiasm compression, medication-resistant hyperprolactinemia, and acromegaly. Learn how advanced endoscopic techniques and multidisciplinary teamwork ensure optimal patient outcomes in pituitary tumor management.

videos.title: Multidisciplinary Neurosurgical Tumor Board: Expert Case Review and Discussion
videos.description: Join Prof. Giv Sharifi at the 55th Specialized Tumor Board Meeting of Salamat-e Farda. This session features a unique, multidisciplinary approach to discussing and reviewing complex neurosurgical cases and brain tumor management. Watch as experts collaborate to provide comprehensive insights into advanced neurosurgical care.

videos.title: Treating Rare Cervical Spine Disorders Causing Dysphagia: A Case Study
videos.description: Discover a complex neurosurgical case where a 73-year-old patient's persistent dysphagia and globus sensation were traced back to a rare cervical spine disorder. Prof. Giv Sharifi explains how Diffuse Idiopathic Skeletal Hyperostosis (DISH) and Ossification of the Posterior Longitudinal Ligament (OPLL) caused significant esophageal and spinal cord compression. Learn how a single-stage anterior surgical approach successfully resolved the patient's symptoms, highlighting the importance of considering spinal pathology in unexplained swallowing difficulties.

videos.title: Understanding Hemifacial Spasm: Diagnosis and Surgical Treatment Options
videos.description: In this educational video, Prof. Guive Sharifi explores the clinical presentation and management of Hemifacial Spasm. Using the case of a 40-year-old patient with hypertension, Prof. Sharifi highlights the importance of thorough diagnostic evaluation for this condition. He explains that while medications and injections may provide temporary relief, surgical intervention remains the only definitive, curative treatment for long-term resolution of hemifacial spasms. Learn about the neurosurgical approach to addressing this involuntary facial muscle contraction.

videos.title: Post-operative visit — young patient after ganglioglioma surgery
videos.description: Clinic visit with a young boy after surgery for a ganglioglioma affecting speech and motor function, with Prof. Giv Sharifi.

videos.title: Facial nerve preservation in acoustic neuroma surgery
videos.description: Successful preservation of the facial nerve in a patient with an acoustic neuroma.

videos.title: Key points in spinal surgery — post-operative visit
videos.description: Important considerations in spinal surgery, with a post-operative clinic visit for spine patients.

videos.title: Anterior cervical surgery — patient gratitude
videos.description: Prof. Sharifi explains anterior neck surgery; a patient shares a thoughtful gift after recovery.

videos.title: After posterior cervical surgery — clinic follow-up
videos.description: Post-operative care tips following posterior neck surgery during an in-clinic visit.

videos.title: Patient artwork after clinoid meningioma surgery
videos.description: A patient's painting and gift long after successful surgery for a clinoid meningioma.

videos.title: Neurosurgery patient story
videos.description: Patient feedback and surgical education from Prof. Giv Sharifi's practice.

videos.title: Eight-year-old patient after brainstem surgery
videos.description: Prof. Sharifi discusses recovery in an eight-year-old child after technical brainstem surgery.

videos.title: Intramedullary spinal tumours — post-op and pre-op visits
videos.description: Overview of intramedullary spinal tumours with simultaneous visits to a post-operative patient and a surgical candidate.
